briefdescription.para: This function calls the handler for invalid commands.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to IPI payload data.
Buffer to store response of slaves.

listitem.para: XPLMI_SSIT_INTR_NOT_ENABLED If interrupts are not enabled.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if a particular Secure API ID is supported or not.

parameterdescription.para: is API ID in the IPI request.

listitem.para: Verify if the provided API ID is supported based on export control bit or not

briefdescription.para: This function processes XilSecure IPI commands.

listitem.para: XST_INVALID_PARAM If any input parameter is invalid.
Call the respective API handler according to API ID

briefdescription.para: This function registers the XilSecure commands to the PLMI.
This file contains the xilsecure IPI handler implementation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
5.6 tvp 07/07/25 Initial release 5.7 tvp 11/18/25 Added support for generating shared secret tvp 11/18/25 Added support for trng operations mb 04/17/26 Update XSecure_CryptoCheck API definition
